market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

analysis.rewritten_desc: This charming 4-guest home in Gateshead offers 2 large double bedrooms and an additional small double, perfect for families or groups seeking comfort. Boasting a 4.69-star rating from 140 reviews, the 140-square-meter property feels spacious despite its modest price. Located just minutes from Newcastle's vibrant nightlife, the home combines convenience with a peaceful stay. With 76 open nights in the next 90 days, guests can enjoy the property's generous layout featuring two living areas and multiple dining options. While the nightly rate of £1006 reflects premium pricing, we're confident in offering a price-occupancy optimization strategy to ensure maximum visibility and bookings in this competitive market.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Prioritize a wide-angle photo of the living room as the cover image to showcase spatial dimensions, followed by the master bedroom and then the kitchen - these rooms typically drive strongest engagement for family-oriented properties
key_diagnosis: Property price is £851.40 above median cohort rate but only 32.6% occupancy vs median 47.8% (15.2% booked in next 90 days) creates pricing occupancy paradox
0 listed amenities vs high-end market's top 3 priority categories: Outdoor, Parking and Entertainment
Title fails to emphasize key differentiators - only mentions bedroom sizes without highlighting 4-guest capacity or proximity to transport
analysis.outreach_hook: You're charging 551% above local median but only 32% occupancy vs market average - optimizing pricing could generate £85k in additional revenue annually
